```{python}
        relations_html += (
            f'<div class="relation-section" style="background:rgba(220,53,69,0.08);border-left:3px solid #dc3545;">'
            f'<div class="relation-label" style="color:#dc3545;">⚔️ Inimigos ({n_enemies})</div>'
            f'{render_avatar_row(enemies, "#dc3545")}'
            f'<div class="fs-sm" style="color:#888;margin-top:0.25rem;">{enemy_emoji_text}</div>'
            f'<div class="fs-sm" style="color:#6c757d;">Score negativo mútuo. Votos contra esperados.</div>'
            f'</div>'
        )
    if false_friends:
        ff_emoji_text = ", ".join(
            f'<span style="color:#dc3545;">{f["name"].split()[0]} ({f.get("their_emoji","?")})</span>'
            for f in false_friends[:6]
        )
        relations_html += (
            f'<div class="relation-section" style="background:rgba(255,193,7,0.1);border-left:3px solid #ffc107;">'
            f'<div class="relation-label" style="color:#ffc107;">⚠️ Falsos Amigos ({n_false_friends}) — PERIGO</div>'
            f'{render_avatar_row(false_friends, "#ffc107")}'
            f'<div class="fs-sm" style="margin-top:0.25rem;">{ff_emoji_text}</div>'
            f'<div class="fs-sm" style="color:#6c757d;">Seu score é positivo, o deles negativo. Votam contra 2-3×.</div>'
            f'</div>'
        )
    if blind_targets:
        bt_emoji_text = ", ".join(
            f'<span style="color:#6f42c1;">{b["name"].split()[0]} ({b.get("my_emoji","?")})</span>'
            for b in blind_targets[:6]
        )
        relations_html += (
            f'<div class="relation-section" style="background:rgba(111,66,193,0.08);border-left:3px solid #6f42c1;">'
            f'<div class="relation-label" style="color:#6f42c1;">🗡️ Alvos Ocultos ({len(blind_targets)})</div>'
            f'{render_avatar_row(blind_targets, "#6f42c1")}'
            f'<div class="fs-sm" style="margin-top:0.25rem;">{bt_emoji_text}</div>'
            f'<div class="fs-sm" style="color:#6c757d;">Seu score é negativo, o deles positivo. Não sabem.</div>'
            f'</div>'
        )

    # ═══ [5] GAME DYNAMICS ═══
    has_dynamics = (events.get('pos_week') or events.get('neg_week') or votes or sincerao_html
                    or events.get('pos_hist') or events.get('neg_hist'))
    dynamics_html = ""
    if has_dynamics:
        dynamics_inner = ""
        if events.get('pos_week'):
            dynamics_inner += (
                f"<div style='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:0.4rem;"
                f"background:rgba(40,167,69,0.06);padding:0.4rem 0.6rem;border-radius:8px;'>"
                f"<strong class='fs-base' style='color:#28a745;'>+ Benefícios</strong> {pos_html}</div>"
            )
        if events.get('neg_week'):
            dynamics_inner += (
                f"<div style='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:0.4rem;"
                f"background:rgba(220,53,69,0.06);padding:0.4rem 0.6rem;border-radius:8px;'>"
                f"<strong class='fs-base' style='color:#dc3545;'>− Prejuízos</strong> {neg_html}</div>"
            )
        if votes:
            dynamics_inner += (
                f"<div style='margin-bottom:0.4rem;'>"
                f"<strong class='fs-base' style='color:#ffc107;display:block;margin-bottom:0.25rem;'>🗳️ Votos recebidos</strong>"
                f"<div style='display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.1rem;'>{votes_html}</div></div>"
            )
        if sincerao_html:
            dynamics_inner += (
                f"<div style='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:0.4rem;'>"
                f"<strong class='fs-base' style='color:#17a2b8;'>🔥 Sincerão</strong> {sincerao_html}</div>"
            )
        if events.get('pos_hist') or events.get('neg_hist'):
            dynamics_inner += (
                f"<div style='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;'>"
                f"<strong class='fs-base' style='color:#999;'>📜 Histórico</strong> {hist_html}</div>"
            )
        dynamics_html = (
            f'<div style="padding:0.6rem 1rem;border-bottom:1px solid #444;background:#2a2a2a;">'
            f'<div class="fs-base" style="font-weight:700;color:#ccc;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">⚡ Dinâmicas do Jogo</div>'
            f'<div class="fs-base">{dynamics_inner}</div>'
            f'</div>'
        )

    # ═══ [6] CURIOSIDADES ═══
    curiosities = p.get("curiosities", [])
    curiosities_html = ""
    if curiosities:
        items_html = "".join(
            f'<div class="curiosity-item">'
            f'<span class="curiosity-icon">{c["icon"]}</span>'
            f'<span>{c["text"]}</span></div>'
            for c in curiosities
        )
        curiosities_html = (
            f'<div style="padding:0.6rem 1rem;background:#2a2a2a;">'
            f'<div class="fs-base" style="font-weight:700;color:#f1c40f;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">💡 Curiosidades</div>'
            f'{items_html}</div>'
        )

    # ═══ ASSEMBLE CARD ═══
    print(f'''
<div id="perfil-{name_slug}" class="profile-card" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">

<!-- [1] Hero Header -->
<div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(48,48,48,0.9),rgba(48,48,48,0.3));border-left:5px solid {cor_grupo};">
<div class="profile-hero-inner">
{avatar_img}
<div>
<h3 class="fs-2xl" style="margin:0 0 0.25rem 0;color:#fff;">{name}</h3>
<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.3rem;align-items:center;">
{group_pill}{role_pill}
</div>
{stat_chips}
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- [2] Status Strip -->
<div class="profile-status-strip">
{status_chips}
</div>

<!-- [3] Reactions -->
<div class="profile-reactions-grid">
<div>
<details class="rxn-detail">
<summary style="cursor:pointer;list-style:none;">
<div class="fs-sm" style="font-weight:600;color:#888;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">RECEBEU <span class="rxn-hint fs-2xs" style="font-weight:400;color:#666;">▶ clique p/ detalhes</span></div>
{rxn_received_chips}
</summary>
<div style="padding-top:0.5rem;">{received_detail_html}</div>
</details>
</div>
<div>
<details class="rxn-detail">
<summary style="cursor:pointer;list-style:none;">
<div class="fs-sm" style="font-weight:600;color:#888;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">DEU <span class="rxn-hint fs-2xs" style="font-weight:400;color:#666;">▶ clique p/ detalhes</span></div>
{rxn_given_chips}
</summary>
<div style="padding-top:0.5rem;">{given_detail_html}</div>
</details>
</div>
</div>

<!-- [4] Game Dynamics -->
{dynamics_html}

<!-- [5] Relations -->
<div class="profile-relations">
{relations_html if relations_html else '<div class="fs-base" style="color:#777;">Sem relações classificadas.</div>'}
</div>

<!-- [6] Curiosidades -->
{curiosities_html}

</div>''')
```

```{python}
#| label: eliminated-section
#| output: asis

eliminated = index_data.get("eliminated", [])
if eliminated:
    status_emoji = {
        "eliminada": "🚪", "eliminado": "🚪",
        "desistente": "🏳️", "desclassificado": "⛔", "desclassificada": "⛔",
    }

    cards_html = ""
    for ex in eliminated:
        name = ex.get("name", "")
        avatar_url = ex.get("avatar", "")
        status = ex.get("status", "")
        label = ex.get("status_label", status)
        emoji = status_emoji.get(status, "❌")
        exit_date = ex.get("exit_date", "")
        reason = ex.get("exit_reason", "")
        member_of_ex = ex.get("member_of", "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(member_of_ex, "#666")
        paredao_num = ex.get("paredao_numero")

        try:
            date_fmt = datetime.strptime(exit_date, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
        except Exception:
            date_fmt = exit_date

        subtitle = f"{emoji} {label}"
        if paredao_num:
            subtitle += f" ({paredao_num}º Paredão)"
        if date_fmt:
            subtitle += f" — {date_fmt}"

        av_img = (
            f'<img src="{avatar_url}" alt="{name}" '
            f'style="width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;'
            f'border:3px solid {cor};flex-shrink:0;filter:grayscale(100%);opacity:0.7;">'
        ) if avatar_url else ""

        reason_html = f'<div class="fs-md" style="color:#999;margin-top:0.3rem;">{reason}</div>' if reason else ""

        cards_html += f'''
<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;padding:0.8rem 1rem;
    background:#1e1e1e;border-left:4px solid {cor};border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
{av_img}
<div>
<div class="fs-lg" style="font-weight:700;color:#ccc;">{name}</div>
<div class="fs-base" style="color:#aaa;">{subtitle}</div>
{reason_html}
</div>
</div>'''

    print(f'''
<div style="margin-top:2rem;">
<h3 class="fs-xl" style="color:#999;margin-bottom:0.8rem;">🖤 Participantes que saíram</h3>
{cards_html}
</div>''')
```

---

<div class="alert alert-info" role="alert">
<strong>💡 Sobre este painel:</strong> Análise estratégica do BBB 26 combinando <strong>queridômetro</strong> (reações diárias), <strong>eventos de poder</strong> (indicações, contragolpes, monstro), <strong>votos da casa</strong>, <strong>Sincerão</strong> e <strong>dinâmicas semanais</strong>. Os scores compostos usam pesos calibrados sem decay — todos os eventos acumulam. Acertou <strong>68% dos votos</strong> nos 2 primeiros paredões. Acompanhamento desde 13 de janeiro de 2026.
</div>
